title: Options AI Commentary — Daily Bilingual Snapshot
description: Bilingual (zh + en) AI market commentary for a single trading day. Written after each daily-report run. Version bump policy: schemas/VERSIONING.md.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the commentary was produced.

zh.description: Traditional Chinese markdown commentary. May contain inline [[pos|neg|key|warn|u:text]] highlight markers.

en.description: English markdown commentary. Same marker syntax as zh.

model.description: Optional — which Gemini model produced this run (for observability).
